calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Minors Employment Contract
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's uncontested petition for approval of minors employment contract.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia M Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:19 a.m. and concluding at 9:21 a.m.

Plaintiff Empire Records Inc. appearing represented by Robert Carroll, Esq.
Minor Carson English is present via Zoom Video Conference, represented by Tucker Page, Esq
Guardian ad Litem Leah English is present via Zoom Video Conference represented by Tucker Page, Esq

The Court has reviewed the minors employment contract and finds it acceptable.

Plaintiffs counsel requests that no contracts other than the one in this petition be approved by the Court at todays hearing.

The Court GRANTS Plaintiffs request.

Matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

(1) The Contract is approved as to all of the terms and conditions set forth therein;

(2) Petitioner EmpireDistribution, Inc. is ORDERED to deduct, until the minor attains the age of eighteen years, fifteen percent (15%) of the gross earnings payable by petitioner to and/or for the services of the minor pursuant to the Contract, and to deposit said fifteen percent (15%) into one or more Coogan Trust Accounts (Blocked Accounts) establised and maintained for the benefit of the minor at one or more financial institutions in the State of California in accordance with California Family Code Section 6753; and

(3) Except as provided in California Family Code Section 6753 (as amended effective January 1, 2004), there shall be no withdrawals of funds on deposit in said Coogan Trust Accounts to minor Julius Ceazar Herrera until he (Julius Ceazar Herrera) attains the age of eighteen (18) years on July 23, 2021, or until further ORDER of this Court.

Counsel to submit Proposed Orders Approving the Contract of the Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account for review and signature by the Court.
(D505)
